nodes.name: Manual Trigger (dev)
nodes.notes: Manual trigger for local testing and portfolio demonstration.

nodes.name: Daily Schedule (prod)
nodes.notes: Runs daily at 17:00 server time. Adjust in n8n UI for weekday-only or weekly digests.

nodes.name: Set Example Ticket Inputs
nodes.notes: Static demo input. Replace with Zendesk, Freshdesk, Intercom, Help Scout, Jira Service Management, or an HTTP Request node in client deployments.

nodes.name: Validate Config / Guardrails
nodes.notes: Validates JSON inputs and creates run-level control metadata, retry policy, idempotency key, and LLM data-handling policy.

nodes.name: Fetch Helpdesk Tickets (placeholder)
nodes.notes: Credential-free helpdesk source placeholder. Replace with Zendesk, Freshdesk, Intercom, Help Scout, Jira Service Management, or HTTP pagination nodes. Returns structured source status.

nodes.name: Normalise & Filter Tickets
nodes.notes: Maps provider-shaped ticket data into a common structure, removes spam/low-signal records, redacts common personal data, and builds counts used by the digest.

nodes.name: Prepare Source Alert Payloads
nodes.notes: Creates operations-alert payloads when the helpdesk source is failed, partial, or empty. Replace downstream delivery with Slack/email/incident tooling in production.

nodes.name: Build Digest Prompt
nodes.notes: Builds a minimised prompt using normalised ticket fields only. This follows the workflow LLM policy and avoids raw transcripts.

nodes.name: Call Local LLM
nodes.notes: Calls the local LLM endpoint for theme synthesis and digest wording. The error output routes to a deterministic fallback digest and alert payload.

nodes.name: Extract Digest
nodes.notes: Normalises common LLM response shapes into digest_markdown. Unexpected response shapes route to fallback and alert handling.

nodes.name: Prepare LLM Failure Alert
nodes.notes: Creates an alert payload when LLM generation or response extraction fails.

nodes.name: Build Deterministic Digest Fallback
nodes.notes: Creates a rule-based fallback digest if the LLM is unavailable or the response shape is unexpected.

nodes.name: Preview / Save Digest
nodes.notes: Creates a previewable digest payload. Replace or extend with file, Google Drive, Notion, database, object storage, or Slack preview storage.

nodes.name: Prepare Leadership Notification (placeholder)
nodes.notes: Prepares the outbound digest payload. Replace with Email, Slack, Teams or another delivery connector configured with n8n Credentials.

nodes.name: Log Audit Snapshot (demo)
nodes.notes: Demo audit checkpoint. Replace or extend with database, spreadsheet, document store, object storage, SIEM, or support-system logging.
